svg.text: Cortex reads with a cheap flash model. Every other system here reads with a premium model.

svg.text: Cortex: our own runs (gemini-3.5-flash reader + judge). Competitors: each system’s own published LongMemEval_S results under its own premium
reader and judge — the field’s reported standing, not a single apples-to-apples harness. Bars start at 0; higher is better.
